caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt with the white text "I NEVER DO SHIT THAT WORK", a green baseball cap, and large black headphones is seated in a room filled with framed photographs on the walls. He is positioned in front of a professional grey microphone on a boom arm. To his left, a black and gold garment is draped over a surface, and in the background, a white mannequin wears a white shirt next to clothing racks. The man is seen smiling and looking down, interacting with something in his hands. Across the frames, he shifts his gaze and slight facial expression while remaining in the same position. In the bottom left and right corners of the scene, there are logos; one is a circular black emblem with white text, and the other is a red logo that reads "ROCKY FELTY TOT".
